title: Converting Semi-Structured CSV Data to Inverted Index
scenario: Converting semi-structured CSV data into an inverted index data structure. The CSV file contains multiple columns, including 'product', 'category', and 'description'. The target LLM output should be a JSON object with the inverted index, where each key represents a term and its corresponding value is a list of documents containing that term.

evaluationCriteria.description: Check if the generated JSON output meets the constraints and requirements.
Verify the accuracy of the inverted index data structure in the JSON output.
Check if the generated JSON output correctly handles out-of-vocabulary terms.
